summary: Mobile/Desktop visual validation of inscricao funnel pages (passo3, passo2, pagamento, comprovante) after mobile-overrides <style id=mobile-overrides> injection. Primary user bug (passo3 mobile cabeçalho gigante/cortado) is FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: Pages inscricao-passo2/pagamento/comprovante do NOT have element #Topo (different layout from passo3). The mobile-overrides rule #Topo{display:none} is therefore a no-op on these 3 pages — original bug only existed on passo3. Injection in other 3 pages is harmless but redundant. Consider centralizing in inscricao-enhance.css with !important + later import order rather than duplicating <style id=mobile-overrides> blocks in each HTML.

Pages inscricao-pagamento.html and inscricao-comprovante.html do NOT expose an h2.tituloPagina selector — so the rule h2.tituloPagina{font-size:20px} has no effect there (it does work on passo3 where it matters).
passo2 mobile: h2.tituloPagina remains 30px (rule not applied). Not blocking, but if uniform compact mobile titles are desired, the override must target the selector actually used in passo2.
Desktop visual review of comprovante and pagamento confirms layout intact (Instituto Ágata logo + brasão Prefeitura render at normal size); no regression.
test_credentials: localStorage seeded with cadastroData + inscricaoData + inscricao_completa (nome:TESTE USUARIO, cpf:13726548793, cargo_titulo:Médico, valor:130, protocolo:XYZ123) to bypass JS guards that redirect to /inscricao.html.
seed_data_creation: Pre-populated localStorage before second navigation to prevent JS redirects from passo3/pagamento/comprovante to /inscricao.html.
context_for_next_testing_agent: On viewport 412x915, navigating directly to inscricao-passo2/pagamento/comprovante triggers JS redirects unless localStorage has cadastroData.nome AND inscricaoData.cargo_titulo. Always populate before second navigation. Use docW/winW comparison for overflow detection.
rca of the issue: Original bug: on mobile, inscricao-passo3.html showed #Topo (Instituto Ágata desktop logo) at full size because inscricao-enhance.css media query rule was being overridden / load-ordered out. Mitigation applied by E1: inline <style id=mobile-overrides> block injected just before </head> with !important rules — guarantees latest cascade + highest specificity. Verified: mobile #Topo display:none, offsetHeight=0; desktop unchanged at 140px. Bug resolved.
